overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through an industrial district at sunset. The player character moves from a covered walkway beneath a pedestrian bridge, through intersections with factory buildings, toward massive electrical transmission towers and storage tanks as the golden sun sets behind the industrial skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath industrial pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the metal truss pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal truss pedestrian walkway spanning across the street with lattice structure
illuminated vertical billboard displaying colorful advertisement graphics
industrial building with corrugated metal panels and graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with a massive metal pedestrian bridge overhead. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing a digital advertising kiosk on the right. A few pedestrians approach from the distance in the industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with multi-story factory building

events.description: turns left at the street corner into the open intersection
exits the covered walkway into open street with full sky visibility and sunset lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and proceeding along the industrial street with illuminated buildings

notable_agents.action: standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: large factory building with illuminated windows and smokestacks emitting steam
tall signal pole with traffic lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, leaving the covered walkway behind. A large multi-story industrial building with glowing windows dominates the right side, while smokestacks rise in the distance against the sunset sky. The environment opens up completely to the evening light.

events.description: massive electrical transmission tower becomes the dominant focal point ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the towering electrical infrastructure in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction toward the electrical tower

entered.detail: massive lattice steel tower with multiple high-voltage power lines extending across the sky
large cylindrical metal storage tanks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the industrial street, the camera approaches a massive electrical transmission tower that dominates the horizon. The street is flanked by industrial buildings and utility poles, with large storage tanks visible on the right. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction toward the tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: electrical substation with transmission towers and storage tanks

events.description: sun becomes visible through industrial structures creating intense golden hour backlighting and lens flare
camera tilts upward to view the top of the electrical transmission tower against the sky

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the base of the massive electrical tower while looking up at the structure

entered.detail: massive industrial storage tank with metal railing on top and weathered metal surface
low concrete barrier wall with industrial piping and equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the base of the massive electrical transmission tower, tilting upward to take in its full height against the golden sunset. Large cylindrical storage tanks flank the right side while the sun creates dramatic backlighting through the industrial structures. The scene emphasizes the scale of the electrical infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered industrial corridor into a vast, open landscape dominated by massive electrical infrastructure under a setting sun. It begins beneath a covered walkway with a heavy metal pedestrian bridge overhead, moving past a digital advertising kiosk and oncoming pedestrians along a concrete sidewalk. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the shelter falls away to reveal a multi-story industrial building with glowing windows and distant smokestacks silhouetted against the evening light. The scene then expands along an industrial street flanked by utility poles and large storage tanks, following a pedestrian toward a towering electrical transmission structure on the horizon. Finally, the camera reaches the base of the massive tower and tilts upward, capturing its immense scale against the dramatic golden backlighting of the sunset.
